quote: Sennen holds space like no one I've ever met. After just one session, I felt a weight I didn't know I was carrying simply dissolve. Her presence is medicine.
The Sacred Container changed everything for me. Having someone witness my journey with such compassion and wisdom helped me reconnect with parts of myself I had buried for years.
I came to Sennen burned out and disconnected. She didn't try to fix me—she simply helped me remember who I already was. That gentle approach was exactly what I needed.
